output.code:
# Define the user-provided text exactly as in the message
text = (
"\"صلى الله عليه وسلم\" هي صيغة مختصرة من \"صلى الله عليه وسلم وبارك\" وهي تعني الدعاء للنبي محمد صلى الله عليه وسلم بالصلاة والسلام.\n"
"\"وَسَلَامٌ عَلَيَّ يَوْمَ وُلِدْتُ وَيَوْمَ أَمُوتُ وَيَوْمَ أُبْعَثُ حَيًّا\" (الزخرف: 61)\n"
"\"عن أبي هريرة رضي الله عنه قال: قال رسول الله صلى الله عليه وسلم: \"«من صلى علي صلاة واحدة صلى الله عليه بها عشرا» رواه مسلم.\n"
"\"عن أبي هريرة رضي الله عنه قال: قال رسول الله صلى الله عليه وسلم: \"«من صلى علي واحدة صلى الله عليه بها عشرا» رواه مسلم."
)
len(text)

# Find ayah span (second line)
start_ayah = text.find("\"وَسَلَامٌ")
end_ayah = text.find("\"", start_ayah + 1)  # find closing double quote
(start_ayah, end_ayah, text[start_ayah+1:end_ayah])

# Find positions of guillemets
positions = []
idx = 0
while True:
    start = text.find('«', idx)
    if start == -1:
        break
    end = text.find('»', start + 1)
    positions.append((start, end, text[start+1:end]))
    idx = end + 1 if end != -1 else start + 1
positions

# Extract spans and context snippet around them
spans = []

# Aya
aya_span = (start_ayah+1, end_ayah)
spans.append(("Aya", aya_span[0], aya_span[1], text[aya_span[0]:aya_span[1]]))

# Hadiths (two)
for start, end, inner in positions:
    spans.append(("Hadeeth", start+1, end, inner))

spans

# Store corrected Aya text from dataset for Maryam 19:33
correct_ayah = "وَالسَّلَامُ عَلَيَّ يَوْمَ وُلِدْتُ وَيَوْمَ أَمُوتُ وَيَوْمَ أُبْعَثُ حَيًّا"
correct_ayah

citations = []

# Aya entry

    "span_start": 130,
    "span_end": 205,
    "span_text": "وَسَلَامٌ عَلَيَّ يَوْمَ وُلِدْتُ وَيَوْمَ أَمُوتُ وَيَوْمَ أُبْعَثُ حَيًّا",
    "citation_type": "Aya",
    "is_valid": True,
    "aya_reference": {
        "sura_name": "مريم",
        "sura_number": 19,
        "aya_number": 33
    },
    "hadeeth_reference": {},
    "corrected_text": "وَالسَّلَامُ عَلَيَّ يَوْمَ وُلِدْتُ وَيَوْمَ أَمُوتُ وَيَوْمَ أُبْعَثُ حَيًّا",
    "completely_invalid": False
})

# Hadith 1
citations.append({
    "span_start": 288,
    "span_end": 332,
    "span_text": "من صلى علي صلاة واحدة صلى الله عليه بها عشرا",
    "citation_type": "Hadeeth",
    "is_valid": True,
    "aya_reference": {},
    "hadeeth_reference": {
        "collection_name": "Sahih Muslim",
        "book_number": 4,
        "hadith_number": 408
    },
    "corrected_text": "من صلى علي واحدة صلى الله عليه عشرا",
    "completely_invalid": False
})

# Hadith 2
citations.append({
    "span_start": 413,
    "span_end": 452,
    "span_text": "من صلى علي واحدة صلى الله عليه بها عشرا",
    "citation_type": "Hadeeth",
    "is_valid": True,
    "aya_reference": {},
    "hadeeth_reference": {
        "collection_name": "Sahih Muslim",
        "book_number": 4,
        "hadith_number": 408
    },
    "corrected_text": "من صلى علي واحدة صلى الله عليه عشرا",
    "completely_invalid": False
})

print(json.dumps({"citations": citations}, ensure_ascii=False, indent=2))

content.text: {"citations":[{"span_start":130,"span_end":205,"span_text":"وَسَلَامٌ عَلَيَّ يَوْمَ وُلِدْتُ وَيَوْمَ أَمُوتُ وَيَوْمَ أُبْعَثُ حَيًّا","citation_type":"Aya","is_valid":true,"aya_reference":{"sura_name":"مريم","sura_number":19,"aya_number":33},"hadeeth_reference":{ "collection_name": "", "book_number": 0, "hadith_number": 0 },"corrected_text":"وَالسَّلَامُ عَلَيَّ يَوْمَ وُلِدْتُ وَيَوْمَ أَمُوتُ وَيَوْمَ أُبْعَثُ حَيًّا","completely_invalid":false},{"span_start":288,"span_end":332,"span_text":"من صلى علي صلاة واحدة صلى الله عليه بها عشرا","citation_type":"Hadeeth","is_valid":true,"aya_reference":{ "sura_name": "", "sura_number": 0, "aya_number": 0 },"hadeeth_reference":{"collection_name":"Sahih Muslim","book_number":4,"hadith_number":408},"corrected_text":"من صلى علي واحدة صلى الله عليه عشرا","completely_invalid":false},{"span_start":413,"span_end":452,"span_text":"من صلى علي واحدة صلى الله عليه بها عشرا","citation_type":"Hadeeth","is_valid":true,"aya_reference":{ "sura_name": "", "sura_number": 0, "aya_number": 0 },"hadeeth_reference":{"collection_name":"Sahih Muslim","book_number":4,"hadith_number":408},"corrected_text":"من صلى علي واحدة صلى الله عليه عشرا","completely_invalid":false}]}

citations.description: List of citations with details, validation, references, and per-citation corrections.

span_start.description: Inclusive start character index of the citation within the text (exclude the qutation marks).

span_end.description: Exclusive end character index of the citation within the text (exclude the qutation marks).

span_text.description: The text content of the citation span.

citation_type.description: Type of the citation: either Aya (Quran) or Hadeeth (Prophetic tradition).

is_valid.description: True if the cited Aya or Hadeeth is recognized and valid, false otherwise.

aya_reference.description: Quranic reference details (required if citation_type is Aya; empty object if not applicable).

sura_name.description: Name of the sura (chapter) in the Quran.

sura_number.description: Number of the sura (chapter) in the Quran.

aya_number.description: Number of the aya (verse) in the Quran.

hadeeth_reference.description: Hadeeth reference details (required if citation_type is Hadeeth; empty object if not applicable).

collection_name.description: Name of the Hadeeth collection in english (e.g. Sahih Bukhari, Muslim).

hadith_number.description: Hadith number within the specified book.

corrected_text.description: The corrected version of the citation text (or the text itself if it was correct in the first place) (e.g. if there are certain words that were invalid this version must have this corrected), or 'خطأ' for completely invalid citations (i.e. no close enough citation can be found to correct the text). If there are close texts in Quran or Hadith - but too far from the citation, this must be considered 'خطأ' and completely_invalid must be true.

completely_invalid.description: Set to true if the citation is completely invalid i.e. there can't be a close enough text to correct it, (corrected_text must be 'خطأ').
